security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' https: data: https://i.ytimg.com https://*.ytimg.com https://*.cdninstagram.com https://*.fbcdn.net https://*.tiktokcdn.com https://*.twimg.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https:

bundle.shortDescription: Transcribe audio from any URL locally
bundle.longDescription: Transcribe audio from YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and 1000+ other sites. All processing happens on your machine — no server, no tracking, no blocking.
